_comment: Merged additively into ~/.claude/settings.json by setup.sh. _comment keys are metadata and are stripped during merge. Do not add these _comment fields to settings.json directly.

bitbucket._comment: PR management, repo discovery, file browsing via Bitbucket Cloud API

atlassian._comment: Jira ticket creation, transitions, Confluence. Auth via browser session — run 'claude mcp auth atlassian' once to authenticate.

git._comment: Local git operations — reading history, blame, diffs. No auth required. Requires uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/).
